TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Damayan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Banrong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 86 buwan, 246 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 239 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 87%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 8%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Damayan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Damayan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Damayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Damayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Damayan hya' ga Kunuan. tay mkyahu' na Damayan hya' ga Donkuan. rekisi alang Damayan ga pzyang qalang nqu bunun. kayal ke kyokay qalang Damayan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Damayan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *amajan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βanroŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *amajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na *amajan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *amajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *amajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *amajan ħjaʔ ɣa kunuan. taj mkjaħuʔ na *amajan ħjaʔ ɣa *onkuan. rekis~ɕi alaŋ *amajan ɣa pzjaŋ qalaŋ nqu βunun. kajal ke kjokaj qalaŋ *amajan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *amajan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Damayan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Banrong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 86 buwan, 246 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 239 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 87%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 8%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Damayan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Damayan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Damayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Damayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Damayan hya' ga Kunuan. tay mkyahu' na Damayan hya' ga Donkuan. rekisi alang Damayan ga pzyang qalang nqu bunun. kayal ke kyokay qalang Damayan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Damayan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *amajan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βanroŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *amajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na *amajan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *amajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *amajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *amajan ħjaʔ ɣa kunuan. taj mkjaħuʔ na *amajan ħjaʔ ɣa *onkuan. rekis~ɕi alaŋ *amajan ɣa pzjaŋ qalaŋ nqu βunun. kajal ke kjokaj qalaŋ *amajan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *amajan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
